context: Laura Creates Studio sole proprietorship - expense reimbursement and client passthrough rules.

validation_rules.rule: Print and shipping costs are billed to the
validation_rules.requirement: Print and shipping costs are billed to the client at actual cost.

validation_rules.rule: Purchases at or above $100 require Laura
validation_rules.requirement: Purchases at or above $100 require Laura's explicit approval before booking.

validation_rules.rule: Subcontractor fees are passed through wit
validation_rules.requirement: Subcontractor fees are passed through with the client estimate.

validation_rules.rule: Receipts are logged within 7 days in the
validation_rules.requirement: Receipts are logged within 7 days in the expense ledger.
